'''Ben Reynolds''' (born 7 January 1982 in [[Lithgow, New South Wales]]) is an Australian [[rugby league]] footballer who played for the [[Wests Tigers]] and [[Penrith Panthers]] in the [[National Rugby League]] competition. His position of choice is at [[Rugby league positions#Scrum-half|half-back]].

== Career highlights ==
His junior club was the Lithgow Shamrocks. He made his first grade debut for Penrith on 2 June 2001, against the [[Brisbane Broncos]] at [[Penrith Stadium]].
